title: I am facing the following error in emails and activities section and I am the owner of the board
excerpt: I need this to track emails for a client but it is not allowing me to integrate.

posts.author: ushahid123 (Usama Shahid)
posts.cookedHtml:
image1450×902 39.2 KB

I need this to track emails for a client but it is not allowing me to integrate.

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ushahid123 !

It looks like you might need to request access to your Admin or board owner. You can do that by going to the integrations center and then choosing Outlook and/or Gmail and then there should be a button to request installation which will give your admins a notification. If you are an admin already, you can add yourself as a board owner by clicking in the board view and then in the top right corner there should be an invite button. Once you click that and see the list of names, you can add yourself and then also click on the crown to the left of your name to make yourself an owner.

Hope this helps!
